name: Luna and the Wasted City of Sin
short_description: A ruin-delving turn-based RPG. After taking on a request, half-beast Luna heads into the overwhelmingly shady ruins, but finds only evil monsters running rampant within... Each time you enter the ruins, the enemies and traps you encounter will change.
detailed_description:
Overview

Each time you delve into the ruins, the enemies and items are different in this RPG.
Defeat each area's boss to move onto the next!

Game System

  • Auto-battle system (progress automatically through battles & the map)
  • Adjustable difficulty level
  • Adjustable player level

Summary

Luna, a cute, furry adventurer, is on a journey around the world and has accidentally strayed into a deserted world full of terrible creatures.
Here, there are evil people and monsters everywhere who will attack, beat and suck the blood from outsiders....
Can she escape before it's too late...?
